input.question: What is the requested grant amount and what will the funds be used for?

documents.name: Plaksha STEM Access Brief
documents.text: Plaksha University is seeking a grant of USD 250,000 to expand its STEM Access Scholarship Fund. The funds will support 40 need-based scholarships for first-generation learners, provide mentoring for recipients, and cover residential bridge-program costs before the first semester.

ground_truth: The requested grant amount is USD 250,000. It will fund 40 need-based scholarships for first-generation learners, mentoring, and residential bridge-program costs before the first semester.

input.question: Which investor is linked to the climate lab and what areas does the lab focus on?

documents.name: Green Horizon Fit Notes
documents.text: Green Horizon Foundation is listed as the recommended investor for the Climate Resilience Lab. The lab focuses on flood-risk analytics, low-cost air-quality sensors, and adaptation planning tools for Indian cities.

ground_truth: Green Horizon Foundation is linked to the Climate Resilience Lab. The lab focuses on flood-risk analytics, low-cost air-quality sensors, and adaptation planning tools for Indian cities.

input.question: Who is the proposal contact person and when is the follow-up deadline?

documents.name: Investor Follow-up Memo
documents.text: The proposal contact is Ananya Mehta, Director of Partnerships. The team should send the revised concept note by May 20, 2026, and schedule a follow-up call during the week of May 25.

ground_truth: The contact person is Ananya Mehta, Director of Partnerships. The revised concept note is due by May 20, 2026, and a follow-up call should be scheduled during the week of May 25.

input.question: What impact metrics should be reported to the funder?

documents.name: Impact Reporting Requirements
documents.text: The funder requested quarterly reporting on student retention, scholarship disbursement, internship placements, and mentor meeting attendance. They also asked for one qualitative student story per quarter.

ground_truth: The impact metrics are student retention, scholarship disbursement, internship placements, mentor meeting attendance, and one qualitative student story each quarter.

input.question: Does the document say who approved the budget?

documents.name: Budget Draft Notes
documents.text: The budget draft lists equipment, faculty honoraria, student travel, and evaluation costs. It notes that finance review is pending and does not name an approver.

ground_truth: No. The document says finance review is pending and does not name a budget approver.
